amendments: Short Title of 1990 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–536, § 1104 Stat. 2368Nov. 8, 1990“This Act [enacting and provisions set out as a note under ] may be cited as the ‘Pecos National Historical Park Expansion Act of 1990’.”section 410rr–7 of this titlesection 410rr–7 of this title

children.text: to recognize the multitheme history, including the cultural interaction among diverse groups of people, of the Pecos area and its “gateway” role between the Great Plains and the Rio Grande Valley, and
to provide for the preservation and interpretation of the cultural and natural resources of the Forked Lightning Ranch by establishing the Pecos National Historical Park.
